entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0015 (50) awarded to SLM CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of -$180,220

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION #0050 IS TO DE-OBLIGATE $180,220 FROM THE TOTAL CONTRACT VALUE.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0015 (52) awarded to SLM CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $180,220

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION 0052 TO CONTRACT# ED-FSA-09-D-0015 IS TO PROVIDE FUNDING FOR SYSTEM CHANGES DUE TO IBR ENHANCEMENTS IMPLEMENTATION.

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0015 (56) awarded to SLM CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: "CRITICAL FUNCTION" - THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO UPDATE THE DEFAULT CALCULATION PERFORMANCE METRIC LANGUAGE AS PROVIDED IN ATTACHMENT A-4 OF THE CONTRACT. THESE METRICS ARE UTILIZED TO EVALUATE THE PERFORMANCE OF FEDERAL STUDENT LOAN SERVICERS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0015 (57) awarded to SLM CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: "CRITICAL FUNCTION". THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO EXTEND THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FOR THE DEFAULT AVERSION PILOT PROGRAM. THE NEW PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE WILL BE FROM JANUARY 1, 2012 THROUGH DECEMBER 31, 2013.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
